2024-present Testing Center Proctor BYU-Idaho Testing Center at Rexburg, ID
• Analyze and record data on 100-150 exams which were taken throughout the day. • Assessed situations of cheating and acknowledge it to students in a calm and direct manner. • Exemplified customer service with stressful students taking exams.
